caption: A football game is played on a green grass field with white yard markers, featuring a matchup between teams with logos and text indicating "COMMANDERS" and "EXO." Players in white uniforms and dark uniforms engage in a play, with the white team advancing the ball. A scoreboard at the top displays "1st & 10," "3:01" or "3:00," and a score of "0" for both sides. In the lower-left corner of each frame, a man with blonde hair wearing a dark blue shirt and headphones is visible in a small inset video window, reacting to the game. As the action progresses, the ball carrier in white moves further down the field, avoiding defenders in dark uniforms. A red marker with an "X" tracks the movement of the play on the turf. The background shows a crowded stadium with spectators and team banners.
